description: It's the end of the month, and the agent needs to generate a financial statement for a property owner.

nodes.task_description: Select the property owner and the correct reporting period (e.g., last month).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the owner and date range.

nodes.task_description: Compile all income (rent) and expenses (management fees, repairs) for the property during that period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully gathers all financial transactions for the property.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formatted owner statement and send it to the property owner's email.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and delivers an accurate financial report.
